projects.title: Digital Library UHAMKA
projects.description: Designed and implemented scalable data migration solutions using Python for an academic digital repository. Built ETL pipelines to extract, transform, cleanse, and load thesis metadata into the institutional repository. Developed data quality validation, reporting dashboards, and visualization tools to improve metadata consistency, searchability, and repository analytics.

projects.title: IoT Smart Watering & Lawn Mowing Robot
projects.description: Developed an IoT-based autonomous robot capable of watering and mowing lawns with smartphone integration. The system supports remote monitoring, scheduling, and control to improve efficiency and sustainability in field maintenance.

projects.title: Population Growth Data Visualization
projects.description: Created an interactive Tableau dashboard visualizing the relationship between marriage, divorce, and population growth. The project provides insights into demographic trends through clear, data-driven visualizations.

projects.title: AI Thesis Search Chatbot
projects.description: Built an AI-powered chatbot integrated with WhatsApp to help students search thesis repositories using semantic search, LangChain, LLM, and Natural Language Processing. The system improves accessibility to academic resources through conversational interactions.

projects.title: Interactive Adventure Portfolio
projects.description: Designed and developed a gamified personal portfolio inspired by 2D adventure games. Features include animated scenes, character interactions, responsive layouts, and immersive storytelling while maintaining a professional experience for recruiters.

projects.title: Thesis Document Processing Automation
projects.description: Developed a Python-based automation tool to standardize, clean, and process student thesis documents before publication. The application reduced manual work, improved formatting consistency, and streamlined institutional publishing workflows.
